title: miconia calycopteris
intro: Miconia calycopteris, also known as the winged miconia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and skin infections, and has been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. In terms of herbal preparations, Miconia calycopteris can be made into a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tincture.
